scene: Teen Byte in ecstatic afternoon mood, having just finished admiring his trophy and now turning back toward his laptop with renewed coding energy, warm golden afternoon light streaming through the Chicago window

subjects.description: Byte in teen stage form: gangly proportions, big expressive eyes showing excitement, fluffy pixelated body with characteristic teen silhouette
subjects.position: centered at desk, body turned slightly toward laptop but head lifted with proud expression
subjects.action: one hand resting on keyboard, other hand gesturing enthusiastically toward laptop screen, ready to code again after trophy admiration break

subjects.description: anchor environment: wooden desk with oversized silver laptop open and glowing, Chicago skyline visible through window behind
subjects.position: desk center stage, window in background showing warm afternoon city view
subjects.action: static environment anchor with laptop screen illuminated

style: pixel art, clean 2D forms, dithered shading, readable silhouette
lighting: warm bright afternoon golden-yellow sunlight streaming through Chicago window, laptop screen adding soft glow
mood: ecstatic and energized, proud of six-day streak, eager to continue coding
background: wooden trophy shelf above desk with golden 10-day trophy on left and green plant friend on right, food bowl with satisfying portions visible on floor to right of desk
composition: Byte as primary foreground subject at desk, trophy shelf visible above, food bowl on floor, Chicago skyline through window
